description: This customizable dark mode template has lots of space to share photos, content, and promotions to celebrate National Garden month. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
